notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman singles on a ground ball to center fielder Daulton Varsho. Brenton Doyle scores.

notableEvents.label: Alejandro Kirk GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Kirk grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Willi Castro to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Kazuma Okamoto out at 2nd. Alejandro Kirk out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. plunked
notableEvents.detail: Blue Jays challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. hit by pitch.
